conventions.by_ascension_maps: Keys are minimum ascension levels; select greatest key <= current level.
conventions.target_defaults: A move effect without explicit target uses the move/card selected target; enemy self-buffs explicitly use self.
conventions.generated_encounters: choose_uniform samples independently unless the encounter says sample_without_replacement.
conventions.ids: Stable snake_case identifiers; display names preserve game capitalization.
conventions.keywords_are_metadata: The keywords arrays are for display, filtering, and indexing. Never infer behavior from a keyword; behavior comes from ordered effects and explicit modifiers such as exhaust_on_use.
conventions.variant_keywords: If base/upgraded contains its own keywords array, it overrides the card-level array for that variant.
conventions.split_hp_override: A spawn hp_override.current_and_max value replaces both current HP and max HP for split offspring.
